ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- {ok: true, ts: now() as Number {unit: "milliseconds"}}

db:select.doc:name: Select Product
db:select.db:sql: SELECT PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_CODE, PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCT_TYPE, UNIT, UNIT_PRICE, IS_ACTIVE FROM MDM_PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCT_ID = :pid

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- if (sizeOf(payload) > 0) { productId: payload[0].PRODUCT_ID, productCode: payload[0].PRODUCT_CODE, productName: payload[0].PRODUCT_NAME, productType: payload[0].PRODUCT_TYPE, unit: payload[0].UNIT, unitPrice: payload[0].UNIT_PRICE, isActive: payload[0].IS_ACTIVE } else {error: "not found"}

db:select.doc:name: Select All Products
db:select.db:sql: SELECT PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCT_TYPE, UNIT, UNIT_PRICE, IS_ACTIVE FROM MDM_PRODUCTS

db:select.doc:name: Select User
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, name, email, region, created_at FROM perf_users WHERE id = :id

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- if (sizeOf(payload) > 0) payload[0] else {error: "not found"}

db:select.doc:name: Select Users by Region
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, name, email, region, created_at FROM perf_users WHERE region = :region

db:insert.doc:name: Insert Order
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO perf_orders (item, qty, price) VALUES (:item, :qty, :price)

db:select.doc:name: Select Created Order
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, item, qty, price, created_at FROM perf_orders WHERE ROWID = :rid

db:execute-ddl.doc:name: Create perf_users
db:execute-ddl.db:sql: CREATE TABLE perf_users ( id NUMBER GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR2(100), email VARCHAR2(200), region VARCHAR2(10), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

logger.message: perf_users already exists or error creating

db:execute-ddl.doc:name: Create perf_orders
db:execute-ddl.db:sql: CREATE TABLE perf_orders ( id NUMBER GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, item VARCHAR2(100), qty NUMBER, price NUMBER, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

logger.message: perf_orders already exists or error creating

db:select.doc:name: Check existing data
db:select.db:sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM perf_users

db:execute-script.doc:name: Seed Data
